phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the Roman Temple
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver o Templo de Diana?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR AW TAYMP-loo DIH DEEAHN-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Roman Temple (Templo de Diana) is a key landmark visible from this viewpoint.

likely_response.local: Daqui vê-se o Templo de Diana.
likely_response.pronunciation: duh-KEE VEH-SIH AW TAYMP-loo DIH DEEAHN-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: From here you can see the Temple of Diana.

responses.english: From here you can see the Temple of Diana.
responses.phonetic: duh-KEE VEH-SIH AW TAYMP-loo DIH DEEAHN-nuh.
responses.local: Daqui vê-se o Templo de Diana.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the Temple of Diana from
phrases.text_local: De onde posso ver o Templo de Diana?
phrases.cultural_note: The Roman temple is visible through the historic urban grid below.

likely_response.local: Do miradouro, em frente ao painel de azulejos.
likely_response.pronunciation: DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo, AYNG FRAYNG-tih OW peye-NEHL DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: From the viewpoint, in front of the azulejo panel.

responses.english: From the viewpoint, in front of the azulejo panel.
responses.phonetic: DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo, AYNG FRAYNG-tih OW peye-NEHL DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
responses.local: Do miradouro, em frente ao painel de azulejos.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o banco de pedra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee FEE-kah oo BAHN-koo jee PEH-drah?

likely_response.local: Ao lado do painel de azulejos.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DOO peye-NEHL DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.

responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DOO peye-NEHL DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh.
responses.local: Ao lado do painel de azulejos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wrought-iron balcony is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a varanda de ferro forjado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH vuh-RAHNNG-duh DIH FEH-roo foo-ruh-ZHAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The railing offers a safe, classic vantage point for photography.

likely_response.local: A varanda de ferro forjado está no miradouro, voltada para o centro histórico.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH vuh-RAHNNG-duh DIH FEH-roo foo-ruh-ZHAH-doo ehs-TAH NOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo, vool-TAH-duh PUH-ruh AW SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: The wrought-iron balcony is at the viewpoint, facing the historic center.

responses.english: The wrought-iron balcony is at the viewpoint, facing the historic center.
responses.phonetic: AH vuh-RAHNNG-duh DIH FEH-roo foo-ruh-ZHAH-doo ehs-TAH NOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo, vool-TAH-duh PUH-ruh AW SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
responses.local: A varanda de ferro forjado está no miradouro, voltada para o centro histórico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the Temple of Diana from
phrases.text_local: De onde se vê o Templo de Diana?
phrases.pronunciation: DIH OHNG-dih SIH VEH AW TAYMP-loo DIH DEEAHN-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The view of the Temple of Diana is a highlight of this spot.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the Cathedral
phrases.text_local: Onde se pode ver a Catedral de Évora?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH PAW-dih VEHR AH kuh-tihd-RAHL DIH EH-voo-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The viewpoint frames the cathedral perfectly against the Alentejo landscape.

likely_response.local: Da varanda, vê-se a Sé de Évora.
likely_response.pronunciation: DUH vuh-RAHNNG-duh, VEH-SIH AH SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: From the balcony, you can see the Cathedral of Évora.

responses.english: From the balcony, you can see the Cathedral of Évora.
responses.phonetic: DUH vuh-RAHNNG-duh, VEH-SIH AH SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh.
responses.local: Da varanda, vê-se a Sé de Évora.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the 1531 azulejo panel is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o painel de azulejos de 1531?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW peye-NEHL DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh DIH MEEL-kee-nyayng-too-zheet-reen-tuheeoom?
phrases.cultural_note: The panel commemorates the 1531 earthquake that reshaped Évora.

likely_response.local: O painel encontra-se na parede do miradouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW peye-NEHL ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NUH puh-REH-dih DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: The panel is on the wall of the viewpoint.

responses.english: The panel is on the wall of the viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: AW peye-NEHL ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH NUH puh-REH-dih DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
responses.local: O painel encontra-se na parede do miradouro.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o banco de pedra para observação?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW BAHNNG-koo DIH PEHD-ruh PUH-ruh awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN?

likely_response.local: O banco de pedra está neste miradouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW BAHNNG-koo DIH PEHD-ruh ehs-TAH NEHSH-tih mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: The stone viewing bench is located at this viewpoint.

responses.english: The stone viewing bench is located at this viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: AW BAHNNG-koo DIH PEHD-ruh ehs-TAH NEHSH-tih mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
responses.local: O banco de pedra está neste miradouro.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o painel de azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW peye-NEHL DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?

likely_response.local: O painel está na parede do miradouro, respeite os limites indicados.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW peye-NEHL ehs-TAH NUH puh-REH-dih DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo, rehsh-PAY-tih OOSH lee-MEE-tihsh een-dee-KAH-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: The panel is on the wall of the viewpoint, respect the indicated boundaries.

responses.english: The panel is on the wall of the viewpoint, respect the indicated boundaries.
responses.phonetic: AW peye-NEHL ehs-TAH NUH puh-REH-dih DOO mee-ruh-DOHW-roo, rehsh-PAY-tih OOSH lee-MEE-tihsh een-dee-KAH-doosh.
responses.local: O painel está na parede do miradouro, respeite os limites indicados.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the stone viewing bench is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o banco de pedra para observar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW BAHNNG-koo DIH PEHD-ruh PUH-ruh awb-sih-ruh-VAHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Rest here to appreciate the panoramic view comfortably.

likely_response.local: Ao lado do painel de azulejos, no centro.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DOO peye-NEHL DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh, NOO SAYNGT-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: The stone viewing bench is next to the azulejo panel, in the center of the viewpoint.

responses.english: The stone viewing bench is next to the azulejo panel, in the center of the viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DOO peye-NEHL DIH uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh, NOO SAYNGT-roo.
responses.local: Ao lado do painel de azulejos, no centro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to see the Sé Cathedral from
phrases.text_local: Onde se vê a Sé de Évora?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH VEH AH SEH DIH EH-voo-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral's bell tower dominates the skyline from this exact angle.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, da varanda de ferro forjado.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, DUH vuh-RAHNNG-duh DIH FEH-roo foo-ruh-ZHAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, from the wrought-iron balcony.

responses.english: Good morning, from the wrought-iron balcony.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, DUH vuh-RAHNNG-duh DIH FEH-roo foo-ruh-ZHAH-doo.
responses.local: Bom dia, da varanda de ferro forjado.
